File(s): whatsapp.service.ts, baileys.service.ts
Change: Fix P2002 unique constraint race condition on message upsert. Prisma upsert does SELECT→INSERT which races when sendText and Baileys messages.upsert event fire concurrently for the same outgoing message. Added safeMessageUpsert() helper that catches P2002 and retries as update. Applied to all 4 upsert call sites (3 in whatsapp.service.ts: sendText, sendMedia, sendLocation; 1 in baileys.service.ts: handleRealtimeMessage).

File(s): backend/src/modules/whatsapp/baileys.service.ts
Change: Fix LIDPhone mapping capture: code listened for non-existent Baileys event 'lid-mapping.update'  replaced with real 'chats.phoneNumberShare' event. Also extract LIDPhone cross-references from 'contacts.upsert' Contact objects (lid/jid/id fields). Added source parameter to handleLidMappingUpdate. Added ev.process() backup handlers for both events. Without this fix, lid_phone_mappings table stayed empty (0 rows) and all @lid private chat webhooks had phone_number=null.

File(s): backend/src/modules/whatsapp/baileys.service.ts
Change: Resolve LIDPhone in webhook payload. In handleRealtimeMessage(), when chatJid ends with @lid, lookup lid_phone_mappings table to resolve phone_number before emitting webhook. Without this, CRM receives phone_number=null for all @lid private chats (87.5% of contacts) and cannot identify customers. Uses existing prisma.lidPhoneMapping.findUnique() with the instance_id_lid_jid composite key. Falls back gracefully with debug log if no mapping exists yet.

File(s): backend/src/modules/whatsapp/baileys.service.ts
Change: Active LID-Phone resolution via onWhatsApp. PATCH-044 only checked DB cache which was empty. Now when no DB mapping exists for an @lid chat, actively queries WhatsApp via sock.onWhatsApp(lid) to resolve the phone JID. Result is cached in lid_phone_mappings for future fast lookups and backfills contact phone_number. This ensures CRM gets phone_number even on first message from a new @lid contact. Fallback chain: DB cache -> onWhatsApp query -> null.

File(s): backend/src/modules/whatsapp/baileys.service.ts
Change: Add contact_name to webhook payload. Webhook message events were missing sender name making CRM unable to display contact names. Fix: extract msg.pushName (WA profile name) from real-time messages and include as contact_name field in webhook payload. Fallback chain: pushName -> Contact.push_name -> Contact.name -> null. Also updates Contact.push_name from incoming messages to keep names fresh.

File(s): backend/src/modules/whatsapp/baileys.service.ts
Change: Download & save incoming media files. Added downloadAndSaveMedia() function that uses Baileys downloadMediaMessage() to download media from incoming IMAGE/VIDEO/AUDIO/DOCUMENT/STICKER messages, then saves to disk via existing saveFile() storage service. Media URL and mimetype stored in DB Message.media_url and Message.media_type columns (already existed in schema but were never populated). Non-critical: download failure does not block message processing. Reuses existing storage.service saveFile() and ensureUploadsDir(). Only downloads for incoming messages (fromMe=false).

File(s): backend/src/modules/whatsapp/baileys.service.ts

CRM can use this URL to display/download the media file. Uses savedMediaUrl from PATCH-047. Field is undefined (omitted from JSON) for non-media messages to maintain backward compatibility.

File(s): backend/src/modules/whatsapp/baileys.service.ts
Change: Fix 2 bugs in PATCH-047 downloadAndSaveMedia: (1) reuploadRequest always undefined because activeSockets.get(msg.key.remoteJid ? "" : "") always resolved to empty string key. Fixed by adding instanceId parameter and using activeSockets.get(instanceId) for correct socket lookup. Without this fix media re-upload from WA servers would always fail. (2) Removed unused import config from ../../config that was accidentally added in PATCH-047 but never referenced (all config.xxx in file are local variables).

File(s): backend/src/modules/whatsapp/baileys.service.ts
Change: Fix sticker detection in ephemeral and viewOnce message wrappers. extractMessageContent() had two wrapper handlers (ephemeralMessage and viewOnceMessage) that did not handle stickerMessage. Stickers in disappearing chats fell to [Disappearing Message] type TEXT and stickers in viewOnce fell to [View Once Message] type TEXT. Now both correctly detect stickerMessage and set type=STICKER. This enables download+save+webhook+frontend render for wrapped stickers.

File(s): Add public /media/* endpoint (no auth) + change downloadAndSaveMedia URL from /uploads/ to /media/. CRM webhook consumers can now access media_url without 401. UUID v4 filenames = unguessable capability URL.

Root cause: decorateReply:false in @fastify/static registration removed reply.sendFile() from all routes. Fix: remove decorateReply:false (default=true). Both /uploads/* and /media/* now serve files correctly.

Root cause: initializeConnection() cleared reconnectTimers but NOT reconnectAttempts. After a loggedOut(401) cycle consumed 10 attempts, manual Connect gets only 1 attempt then hits MAX. Fix: add reconnectAttempts.delete(instanceId) at start of initializeConnection().
Add localhost:3002 (CRM-DADI frontend) to CORS_ORIGIN in .env so CRM can communicate with WAAPI backend.

Root cause: sendMediaMessage passed self-hosted upload URL (http://localhost:3001/uploads/...) to Baileys which (a) was blocked by SSRF validator (localhost in BLOCKED_HOSTNAMES) and (b) required JWT auth that Baileys doesn't have. Fix: add resolveMediaSource() that detects self-hosted URLs and resolves to local file path. Baileys reads file from disk directly. Remote URLs still get SSRF validation.

Root cause: @fastify/multipart limit was 10MB but video allows 64MB and document 100MB. Files >10MB threw RequestFileTooLargeError which error handler didn't recognize → generic 500. Fix: increase limit to 100MB to match storage.service.ts MAX_SIZES. Add RequestFileTooLargeError/413 handler in errorHandler returning proper 413 with FILE_TOO_LARGE code.

Root cause: frontend sends 'type' as multipart form field (formData.append) but backend reads from query param (request.query.type) → always undefined → type validation skipped. Fix: read type from data.fields.type (multipart field) with query param fallback.

New endpoint POST /api/v1/media/upload — allows CRM/n8n/Zapier to upload media via API Key (permission: message:send). Accepts multipart/form-data with file + type field. Returns public URL (/media/ prefix), media_type, mime_type, file_size, original_name. Uses existing validateFile + saveFile from storage.service.

Add mime_type field to webhook payload for incoming media messages. Extracted from downloadAndSaveMedia return (mimetype from Baileys media message). Added to MessageWebhookPayload.data interface in webhooks.schema.ts.

Add file_size field (bytes) to webhook payload for incoming media messages. Extracted from buffer length in downloadAndSaveMedia. Added fileSize to return type, savedFileSize variable in handleRealtimeMessage, and file_size to webhook emit. Updated MessageWebhookPayload interface.

Add file_name field to webhook payload for incoming media messages. Extracted from mediaMsg.fileName (only exists for document messages — sender's original filename). Extended downloadAndSaveMedia return type with fileName, added savedFileName capture in handleRealtimeMessage, added file_name to webhook emit. Updated MessageWebhookPayload interface.

Root cause: handleRealtimeMessage had guard '!fromMe' on downloadAndSaveMedia — all outgoing media skipped download → media_url always null for messages sent from phone (not via API). Fix: remove !fromMe guard so downloadAndSaveMedia runs for ALL media messages (incoming & outgoing). In upsert update branch for fromMe, set media_url with locally-saved /media/ URL (overrides original URL with better public path). Stickers, images, videos, audio, documents sent from phone now have valid media_url.

Root cause: webhook contact_name for outgoing messages used msg.pushName which is the SENDER's (account owner) WA profile name, NOT the recipient's name. When Adi sends first msg to friend, webhook has contact_name='Adi Syahadi' for friend's number. CRM auto-saves contact with wrong name. Fix: split contactName resolution — for outgoing (fromMe): look up recipient's name from Contact DB via chatJid. For incoming (!fromMe): keep using msg.pushName (sender = the contact). push_name DB update already safe (guarded by !fromMe).

Root cause: handleAutoReply() in webhook.worker.ts sends auto-reply via socket.sendMessage() but does NOT emit baileysEvents message event. All other send functions (sendText, sendMedia, sendLocation) emit baileysEvents.emit('message', {type:'outgoing'}) which triggers message.sent webhook delivery to n8n/CRM. Auto-reply was invisible: no webhook, no wa_message_id, no sent_at. Fix: (1) capture sentMsg.key.id as waMessageId, (2) upsert with wa_message_id to prevent duplicate DB records, (3) emit baileysEvents.emit('message', {type:'outgoing'}) to fire message.sent webhook, (4) add source REALTIME + sent_at. Impact: n8n now receives message.sent webhook for auto-replies and can forward to CRM.

New feature: POST /api/v1/messages/delete endpoint for deleting/revoking WhatsApp messages. Supports delete_for='everyone' (revoke for all via socket.sendMessage with WAMessageKey delete) and delete_for='me' (local delete via socket.chatModify deleteForMe). Three-layer implementation: (1) deleteMessageForInstance() in baileys.service.ts — low-level Baileys interaction, (2) deleteMessage() in whatsapp.service.ts — service layer with verifyInstanceForMessaging + DB status update to DELETED + webhook emission, (3) POST /messages/delete route in external-api.routes.ts with JSON schema validation. Also added DELETED to MessageStatus Prisma enum with DB migration. Params: instance_id, message_id (wa_message_id), chat_jid (required); from_me, participant, delete_for (optional). Permission: message:send.

New feature: POST /api/v1/messages/edit endpoint for editing WhatsApp messages (text body or media caption). Uses Baileys edit mechanism: socket.sendMessage(jid, { text: newText, edit: WAMessageKey }). Three-layer implementation: (1) editMessageForInstance() in baileys.service.ts — low-level Baileys interaction with fromMe:true enforced, (2) editMessage() in whatsapp.service.ts — service layer with verifyInstanceForMessaging + DB content update + edited_at timestamp + webhook emission (type:'edit'), (3) POST /messages/edit route in external-api.routes.ts with JSON schema validation (maxLength:4096, empty check). Also added edited_at DateTime? column to Message model via Prisma migration. Params: instance_id, message_id, chat_jid, new_text (all required). Permission: message:send. WhatsApp enforces ~15 min time limit server-side.

Security fix: Prevent path traversal in session.service.ts. (1) Added validateInstanceId() — rejects any instanceId not matching UUID v4 regex, applied in getSessionPath(). (2) Added sanitizeFileName() — strips path separators and '..' from file names in restoreSession(). (3) Added assertPathWithinBase() — final safety net ensures resolved paths never escape storage/sessions/ directory. Three layers of defense: input validation + sanitization + output validation.

Security fix: Added requireApiKeyPermission() to 8 unprotected endpoints in external-api.routes.ts. GET /instances + GET /instances/:id/status → instance:read. GET /instances/:id/auto-reply → instance:read. PATCH /instances/:id/auto-reply → instance:write. GET sync-history/status → instance:read. PATCH sync-history/settings + POST re-pair + POST control → instance:write. Also replaced redundant authenticateApiKey preHandlers (global hook already runs it).

Security fix: Changed rate limiter behavior from fail-open to fail-closed when Redis is unavailable. In api-rate-limiter.ts checkRateLimit() catch block: changed allowed:true to allowed:false, remaining:limit-1 to remaining:0, log level from warn to error. Prevents unlimited API access during Redis outages.

Race condition fix: In disconnectInstance() baileys.service.ts, removed the finally{} block that prematurely cleared manuallyDisconnecting flag before the async close event could consume it. Now the close event handler (line 1080) is the only consumer of the flag. Added 10-second safety-net setTimeout to clear the flag if close event never fires, preventing permanent flag leak. Prevents ghost reconnections and status flickering.

Race condition fix: Added connectingInstances Set guard in baileys.service.ts. At the top of initializeConnection(), checks if instanceId is already being connected — returns early with error if so. Added to set before socket creation, removed in finally{} block. Prevents duplicate socket creation when concurrent calls (e.g. startup timeouts overlapping) both pass the existingSocket?.user check. Eliminates orphaned sockets and listener leaks.

TOCTOU fix: Wrapped createInstance() count-check + create in prisma.$transaction() in whatsapp.service.ts. Both the organization count query and the whatsAppInstance.create now execute inside an interactive transaction, preventing concurrent requests from both passing the limit check before either inserts. Eliminates subscription limit bypass via parallel API calls.

Loop prevention: Added per-sender cooldown (30s) in webhook.worker.ts to break infinite ping-pong between two auto-reply-enabled instances. Uses in-memory Map keyed by instanceId:senderJid with periodic cleanup. Also added self-JID guard to skip auto-replying to own number. Memory-safe with 10K entry cap and 60s periodic sweep. Completely eliminates B1 finding.

Tenant isolation: Added organizationId parameter to updateWarmingPhase() in whatsapp.service.ts. Changed findUnique({id}) to findFirst({id, organization_id, deleted_at:null}) to enforce tenant boundary. Prevents cross-organization warming phase manipulation via bare instanceId. Eliminates B2 finding.

H1 fix: Changed monkey-patched socket.ev.emit from (event:any,data:any) to (...args:any[]) with destructuring. Return now uses originalEmit(...args) spread. Preserves all Baileys emit arguments if signature changes.
H2 fix: Added setMaxListeners(50) and error event handler to baileysEvents EventEmitter. Prevents MaxListenersExceededWarning and process crash if error event emitted without handler.
H3 fix: Replaced 3x prisma.whatsAppInstance.update({decrement:5}) with raw SQL GREATEST(health_score-5,0) in baileys.service.ts. Clamps health_score floor at 0.
H4 fix: Wrapped socket.onWhatsApp() call in Promise.race with 5s timeout in handleRealtimeMessage LID resolution path. Prevents blocking event loop on slow WhatsApp server responses.

H5 fix: Extracted hardcoded '62' to DEFAULT_COUNTRY_CODE constant in config/constants.ts (env: DEFAULT_COUNTRY_CODE). Updated 4 files: helpers.ts, baileys.service.ts, contacts.schema.ts, broadcasts.schema.ts.
H6 fix: Changed safeMessageUpsert in both whatsapp.service.ts and baileys.service.ts to re-throw on update failure instead of silently dropping the message. Elevated log from warn to error.

H7 fix: Rewrote deleteInstance() to use updateMany (verify ownership + soft-delete atomically) first, then perform side effects (disconnect + session delete) with try/catch. Side effects are non-critical and idempotent.

H8 fix: Wrapped post-send DB writes (daily_message_count increment) in try/catch for sendTextMessage, sendMediaMessage, sendLocationMessage. Message already sent on WhatsApp is irreversible — DB failure should not report success:false to caller.
H9 fix: Added Math.min(limit,100) cap in getMessages() and getAllMessages() in whatsapp.service.ts. Prevents clients from requesting limit=999999.
H10 fix: Wrapped webhook log delete + webhook delete + message delete in prisma.$transaction([]) in external-api.routes.ts data cleanup endpoint. Ensures atomicity of cascading deletes.

H11 fix: Removed /api prefix from 3 history sync route URLs in external-api.routes.ts (status,settings,re-pair). Routes were double-prefixed: /api/v1/api/instances/... Now correctly /api/v1/instances/...
H13 fix: Replaced 6 non-null assertions (!) in api-key-auth.ts with explicit null check + AppError throw. Prevents downstream crashes if validateApiKey returns incomplete data.
H14 fix: Added await prisma.$disconnect() to graceful shutdown handler in index.ts before process.exit(0). Fixes dangling DB connections since beforeExit does not fire with explicit process.exit().

H15 fix: Added rate limiting (60 req/min) and security headers (Cache-Control:private,no-store + X-Content-Type-Options:nosniff) to /media/* endpoint in index.ts. Mitigates enumeration attacks without breaking existing CRM capability URL pattern.

H16 fix: Replaced pipeline-based sliding window with atomic Lua script in api-rate-limiter.ts. Script removes expired entries, checks count, adds new entry only if under limit — all in one atomic Redis operation. Fixes off-by-one (count<=limit was allowing limit+1) and race condition between concurrent requests.

H12 fix: Converted hot-path file I/O in session.service.ts from sync to async. readJsonFile now uses fsp.readFile, writeJsonFile uses fsp.mkdir+fsp.writeFile, writeKey uses fsp.unlink. Baileys auth state keys.get/keys.set now properly await async operations. Eliminates event loop blocking during message processing.
M5 fix: Added reconnectAttempts.delete() and reconnectTimers.delete() in disconnectInstance() of baileys.service.ts. Prevents stale reconnect state from leaking across disconnect/reconnect cycles.
M7 fix: Extracted duplicate safeMessageUpsert into shared backend/src/utils/safe-upsert.ts. Updated baileys.service.ts and whatsapp.service.ts to import from shared util. Single source of truth.
M20 fix: Added .regex(/^\+?[0-9]+$/) validation to phone_numbers and phone_number fields in broadcasts.schema.ts. Rejects non-numeric input at API boundary.
M18 fix: Added setInterval cleanup in baileys.service.ts that sweeps expired qrCodeStore entries every 5 minutes. Uses .unref() to not block process shutdown.
M4 fix: Added 5-minute TTL to syncConfigCache in baileys.service.ts. Entries now store cachedAt timestamp and auto-expire. Prevents stale sync config from persisting indefinitely.

M6 fix: Extracted 6 hardcoded values from webhooks.service.ts to WEBHOOK_CONFIG in constants.ts: TIMEOUT_MS, RESPONSE_TRUNCATE_LENGTH, BACKOFF_BASE_MS, REMOVE_ON_COMPLETE_COUNT, REMOVE_ON_COMPLETE_AGE_S, REMOVE_ON_FAIL_COUNT.

M1 fix: Replaced N+1 lastMessage/unreadCount queries in external-api.routes.ts conversation list with batch groupBy for unread counts and raw SQL ROW_NUMBER() for last messages. Reduces DB queries from 2N+1 to 3.
M22 fix: Enhanced /health endpoint in index.ts with DB ping (SELECT 1) and Redis ping. Returns degraded status if either service is down. Added getRedisForHealthCheck export to api-rate-limiter.ts.

M16 fix: Added genReqId + requestIdHeader to Fastify config in index.ts. Generates UUID if no X-Request-Id header present. Echoes request ID back in response via onRequest hook. Enables log correlation.
M17 fix: Added ±25% jitter to webhook retry delay calculation in webhooks.service.ts. Prevents thundering herd when multiple webhooks fail simultaneously.

M19 fix: writeJsonFile in session.service.ts now uses atomic write-to-tmp-then-rename pattern. Detects ENOSPC/EDQUOT disk-full errors and re-throws them (logged as fatal) instead of silently swallowing.
M21 fix: Restricted broadcast variable schema from z.any() to z.union([z.string(), z.number()]). replaceVariables now logs warning with missing placeholder keys for debug.
M8 fix: Replaced 3 plain Error throws in session.service.ts security validators with AppError (400/403 status codes + error codes). Imported AppError from types.
M11 fix: Removed 4 unused imports: Boom and proto from session.service.ts, getAggregateVotesInPollMessage and WarmingPhase from baileys.service.ts.
M14: initializeConnection ~600 lines — deferred to future refactor. Risk/benefit ratio too high for current hardening pass. Documented for next iteration.
L2 fix: Replaced console.warn in broadcasts.schema.ts replaceVariables with structured logger.warn.
L11 fix: Moved WARMING_PHASE_LIMITS + WarmingPhaseType to constants.ts as single source of truth. Updated whatsapp.schema.ts (re-export) and daily-reset.worker.ts (import).
L15 fix: Extracted 7 magic numbers from baileys.service.ts to BAILEYS_CONFIG constants (CONNECT_TIMEOUT_MS, ZOMBIE thresholds, QR_EXPIRY_MS, etc.).
L3 fix: Added logger.warn for unimplemented email sending in auth.service.ts.
L4 fix: Replaced 4x (request as any).user with (request as AuthenticatedRequest).user in whatsapp.routes.ts.
L12+L13 fix: Standardized 24 plain string error responses to structured {code,message} format across external-api.routes.ts (13) and whatsapp.routes.ts (11).
L6 fix: Created HistorySyncProgress interface + parseProgress() helper in baileys.service.ts, eliminated 12 as-any casts for history sync progress events.
L9+L10 fix: Moved extractPhoneFromJid to utils/helpers.ts as canonical implementation. Re-exported from baileys.service.ts for backward compat. Marked formatToJid/parseJid as deprecated.
L5 fix: Replaced user:any params in auth.service.ts — generateTokens uses Pick<User,'id'|'role'|'email'>, sanitizeUser uses User type. Imported User from @prisma/client.
L8 fix: Replaced convertMessageTimestamp(ts:any) with proper union type number|{toNumber():number}|null|undefined in baileys.service.ts.

L14 fix: Added custom validation messages to all user-facing Zod schemas missing them. 5 files: auth.schema.ts (updateProfile), whatsapp.schema.ts (sendLocation, sendContact), contacts.schema.ts (updateContact), api-keys.schema.ts (create/update), broadcasts.schema.ts (update, addRecipients).

R-01 fix: Removed local requireRole in team.routes.ts, replaced with global requireRole from rbac.ts which has SUPER_ADMIN bypass. 8 usages updated to use UserRole enum. SUPER_ADMIN can now manage teams.

R-02 fix: Removed 3 duplicate requireSuperAdmin definitions from subscription-plans.routes.ts, invoices.routes.ts, payments.routes.ts. Replaced 22 usages with [requireAuth, requireRole(UserRole.SUPER_ADMIN)] using global rbac middleware.
R-03+R-04 fix: Updated sidebar.tsx Team roles from [ORG_OWNER] to [SUPER_ADMIN, ORG_OWNER, ORG_ADMIN]. Billing roles from [ORG_OWNER] to [SUPER_ADMIN, ORG_OWNER]. Matches backend RBAC.
R-05 fix: Added Admin nav item to sidebar.tsx with roles [SUPER_ADMIN], children: Users + Organizations. Added Shield icon import.

R-06 fix: Created layout.tsx route guards for team (SUPER_ADMIN/ORG_OWNER/ORG_ADMIN) and billing (SUPER_ADMIN/ORG_OWNER). Uses same pattern as admin/layout.tsx. Prevents direct URL access by unauthorized roles.

R-07+R-08 fix: Enforced RBAC on business endpoints. WhatsApp instance mgmt (10 WRITE routes) restricted to ORG_OWNER/ORG_ADMIN. Webhook WRITE (7 routes) and API-Key WRITE (4 routes) same. Contacts & Broadcasts unchanged (all roles). Total 21 routes secured.

Separated SUPER_ADMIN sidebar from tenant sidebar. SUPER_ADMIN sees admin-only menu: Dashboard, Organizations, Users, Instances, Plans, Invoices, Payments, Settings. Tenant users see normal menu without admin items.

Created /api/admin module with 10 endpoints: stats, organizations CRUD, users list, instances list, invoices list, invoice verify/approve, system health, audit-logs placeholder. All SUPER_ADMIN-only via rbac middleware.

Created 4 new admin pages: invoices (with approve/reject modal), plans (CRUD with dialog), instances (list+filter), payments (config toggle+edit). Updated admin API client with plans+payments methods. Fixed dashboard quick link.
SUPER_ADMIN login redirects to /dashboard/admin. Regular /dashboard page also redirects SUPER_ADMIN to admin dashboard. Login page reads role from store after login.
Auto-generate slug from plan name on create. Fix plans array extraction (data.data.plans). Add QUARTERLY billing period option.
Add allow_history_sync and max_sync_messages to createPlanSchema/updatePlanSchema. Include in service createPlan/updatePlan.

Redirect adminApi from /api/admin/invoices to /api/invoices/admin/all (proper transform+filters). verifyInvoice now calls /api/invoices/admin/:id/verify (activates subscription). Send payment_notes. Remove duplicate invoice handlers from admin.routes.ts.
Add invoice stats cards (total/revenue/pending/paid). Add Plan column in table. Fix pagination key (total_pages). Show plan in verify dialog. Invalidate stats on verify.
Fix admin payments page crash: backend returns {methods:[...]} but FE did data?.data||[] getting object not array. Changed to data?.data?.methods||[].
Add Midtrans config editing to payment edit dialog: server_key, client_key, is_production fields. openEdit loads config_data, handleSave bundles config_data for MIDTRANS_ methods.
Add config status badge on Midtrans payment cards: green 'Configured' if server_key set, yellow 'Belum Dikonfigurasi' otherwise.
Create settings module (service+routes) for SystemSetting CRUD. GET/PUT/DELETE at /api/admin/settings. Bulk upsert support. Registered in index.ts.
Update getMidtransConfig() in payments.service to read from SystemSetting table (key prefix midtrans.) instead of per-method config_data. Falls back to env vars.
Build Admin Settings page with Midtrans Payment Gateway config section (server_key, client_key, is_production, merchant_id). Added settings API calls to api.ts. Replaces Coming Soon placeholder.
Remove Midtrans config fields from Payment page edit dialog. Add link to Settings page on Midtrans cards. Clean up unused Badge import and config_data from interface.
